prompt:
Create a 9:16 vertical Instagram Story announcement in 4K — CACTUS CLOUDS now stocking MUHA MEDS. Direction: 'EDC MAINSTAGE TOTEM' — a full-blown EDC mainstage moment, butterflies + daisies + lasers + crowd, with the Muha Meds emblem as the centerpiece totem-piece of the stage. Maximum festival energy, but ONE cohesive palette so it doesn't look like a clown's pocket.

=== COMPOSITION (top-to-bottom) ===

TOP (~10%): the CACTUS CLOUDS logo (FAITHFULLY from the FIRST reference image — white cursive 'Cactus clouds' with green outline + clouds + green saguaro + butterfly). Centered, with a thin warm gold halo behind it. A pair of small glowing magenta-winged neon butterflies flank the wordmark.

UPPER-MIDDLE (~10%): headline 'NOW STOCKED AT CACTUS CLOUDS' — two centered lines on an EDC-stage LED panel feel. 'NOW STOCKED AT' on top (smaller tracked all-caps sans, white). 'CACTUS CLOUDS' below (BIG chunky blocky condensed display sans-serif, gold gradient fill with a single thin hot-magenta neon outline and a subtle outer pink bloom). Faint horizontal scan-line texture on the headline.

CENTER-HERO (~35%): the GOLD MUHA MEDS 'MM' emblem (FAITHFULLY from the SECOND reference image — ornate gothic interlocking M monogram in gold) BIG and centered, set inside an ORNATE EDC-STAGE PORTAL FRAME. The frame is a massive symmetrical winged geometric arch — two huge BUTTERFLY WINGS spread outward from behind the emblem (clean line-art-style stage geometry, NOT painterly butterflies — render them like an EDC mainstage rigging silhouette with neon outlines). The wings + arch are rendered in CLEAN GOLD LINEWORK with a HOT MAGENTA inner glow, giving a stained-glass-cathedral-meets-festival-rig look. Behind the wing-arch, a fan of LASER BEAMS shoots outward diagonally to the corners — ALL LASERS IN A SINGLE HOT MAGENTA / PINK HUE, no rainbow. Below the emblem, a vertical column of warm gold uplight rises from the stage. Two slim spotlight cones angle in from the upper corners. A few glowing white daisies with gold centers and pink-tinted petals (EDC trademark daisies) float at the edges of the wing-arch. Optional: a few pink butterflies in flight near the emblem.

LOWER-MIDDLE (~25%): the three MUHA MEDS product boxes on a glossy black mirror-finish stage edge / runway. Arrangement: FROZEN POMEGRANATE LEFT (THIRD reference image), BLUE SLUSHIE CENTER and slightly forward / largest (FOURTH reference image), GALACTIC DIESEL RIGHT (FIFTH reference image). Render each box FAITHFULLY from its ref. CRITICAL: ONLY THE BOXES — NO vape pens / devices / cartridges anywhere. Each box catches a clean soft mirror reflection on the stage surface. Subtle warm gold rim-light on the box edges from the emblem above, and a faint hot-pink underglow on the stage around each box.

FAR-BACKGROUND (visible behind/around the wing-arch, ~10%): a low, dark FESTIVAL CROWD silhouette running along the horizon line — tens of thousands of tiny dark heads + raised hands + the occasional totem pole + a few hot-pink laser sweep beams overhead. The crowd reads as small, distant, atmospheric — feels MASSIVE without overpowering the foreground. Soft volumetric haze + bloom over the crowd. ONE distant ferris wheel silhouette far off to one side, accented by a single warm gold outline.

FOREGROUND ACCENTS: a sparse confetti of small white-and-gold sparkles + a few drifting kandi-bead trails in gold and hot-pink only (no other colors), arcing across the lower frame. Two small green neon saguaro cactus silhouettes flank the boxes on the far edges (the only green elements in the scene besides the Cactus Clouds wordmark).

LOWER-BOTTOM (~10%): a single thin hot-magenta hairline rule. Below it, centered tracked white all-caps text: 'AVAILABLE NOW  ·  21+'. Below that, a compact lockup: small Cactus Clouds logo on the left, a thin gold 'X' in the middle, small gold MM emblem on the right.

=== STYLE & PALETTE (TIGHT) ===
Only these colors: RICH GOLD (dominant — emblem, wing-arch linework, headline fill, daisy centers, rim-lights), HOT MAGENTA / PINK NEON (single hue — outline accents, laser fans, butterfly wings, underglow, hairline rule, kandi beads), DEEP MIDNIGHT INDIGO / BLACK (background), and PURE WHITE (type, sparkles, daisy petals). One TINY touch of the Cactus Clouds GREEN ONLY in the Cactus Clouds wordmark and the two small saguaro silhouettes. NO cyan, NO violet, NO acid green, NO yellow except the gold. The whole frame reads cohesively duotone gold-and-magenta on midnight.
Background: deep midnight indigo-to-black, with the gold uplift column behind the emblem and pink atmosphere over the distant crowd. Volumetric haze, lens flare on the emblem, soft chromatic bloom on the headline.
Finish: maximum EDC mainstage energy — laser fans, glow, atmosphere, festival depth — but kept cohesive by the strict gold + magenta + black palette. Premium poster-grade.

=== STRICT RULES ===
- ONLY THE BOXES from the three product references. NO devices anywhere.
- Preserve Cactus Clouds wordmark and Muha Meds emblem EXACTLY as in refs.
- Spelling: 'CACTUS CLOUDS', 'MUHA MEDS', 'NOW STOCKED AT', 'AVAILABLE NOW  ·  21+', 'BLUE SLUSHIE', 'FROZEN POMEGRANATE', 'GALACTIC DIESEL'. No 'LIMITED DROP' anywhere.
- 9:16 portrait, full-bleed, no border. Premium EDC mainstage poster execution.
